name: Ranch Style Chicken Fried Steak and Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Tenderize round steak.
2. Dip in milk, then flour, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Fry in deep fat at approximately 375 Degrees F until golden brown.
4. Pour off fat, leaving about 4 tablespoons in the pan.
5. Add 4 tablespoons flour and stir until smooth.
6. Add 1 quart of milk and stir until thickened for steak gravy.
